description: Small benchmark for semantic similarity, entity extraction, and intent evaluation.

samples.reference: The customer requested a refund because the delivery arrived late.
samples.prediction: The user asked for a refund after a late delivery.

samples.reference: The patient reports mild headache and no fever.
samples.prediction: The patient reports severe fever and headache.

samples.reference: Route this ticket to the billing team for invoice correction.
samples.prediction: Send this case to engineering for an outage investigation.
